req.title: Cheque deposit by mobile
req.statement: A customer shall deposit a cheque via mobile image; cheques above $5,000 shall require manual verification.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
# Pytest Tests for Mobile Cheque Deposit Requirement

```python
"""
Test Suite: Mobile Cheque Deposit via Image
Requirement: A customer shall deposit a cheque via mobile image;
             cheques above $5,000 shall require manual verification.
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, AsyncMock
from decimal import Decimal
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models / enums assumed from production code
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# from cheque_deposit.service import ChequDepositService
# from cheque_deposit.models import (
#     ChequeDeposit, DepositStatus, VerificationStatus, ChequeImage
# )
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


class DepositStatus(Enum):
    PENDING = "PENDING"
    APPROVED = "APPROVED"
    REJECTED = "REJECTED"
    MANUAL_REVIEW = "MANUAL_REVIEW"


class VerificationStatus(Enum):
    AUTO_APPROVED = "AUTO_APPROVED"
    MANUAL_REQUIRED = "MANUAL_REQUIRED"


# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Fixtures
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

MANUAL_REVIEW_THRESHOLD = Decimal("5000.00")


@pytest.fixture
def valid_cheque_image():
    """Returns a mock of a valid, readable mobile cheque image."""
    image = MagicMock()
    image.filename = "cheque_front.jpg"
    image.content_type = "image/jpeg"
    image.size_bytes = 2_000_000          # 2 MB
    image.is_readable = True
    image.is_blurry = False
    image.all_fields_visible = True
    return image


@pytest.fixture
def blurry_cheque_image(valid_cheque_image):
    valid_cheque_image.is_blurry = True
    valid_cheque_image.all_fields_visible = False
    return valid_cheque_image


@pytest.fixture
def oversized_cheque_image(valid_cheque_image):
    valid_cheque_image.size_bytes = 20_000_000   # 20 MB – exceeds limit
    return valid_cheque_image


@pytest.fixture
def mock_deposit_service():
    service = MagicMock()
    service.MANUAL_REVIEW_THRESHOLD = MANUAL_REVIEW_THRESHOLD
    return service


@pytest.fixture
def authenticated_customer():
    customer = MagicMock()
    customer.id = "CUST-001"
    customer.is_authenticated = True
    customer.account_number = "ACC-123456"
    customer.is_active = True
    return customer


@pytest.fixture
def unauthenticated_customer():
    customer = MagicMock()
    customer.id = None
    customer.is_authenticated = False
    return customer


# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Helper
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def make_deposit_result(amount, image, service):
    """
    Thin wrapper that mirrors the real service interface so that the
    same assertion helpers work for both unit and integration tests.
    """
    return service.deposit_cheque(
        customer_id=authenticated_customer,
        amount=Decimal(str(amount)),
        image=image,
    )


# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 1. IMAGE SUBMISSION
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class TestMobileImageSubmission:

    def test_deposit_accepted_with_valid_jpeg_image(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """Happy-path: a valid JPEG image triggers a successful deposit request."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.PENDING, deposit_id="DEP-001"
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("500.00"),
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.assert_called_once()
        assert result.status == DepositStatus.PENDING
        assert result.deposit_id is not None

    def test_deposit_accepted_with_valid_png_image(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """PNG images must also be accepted as a valid submission format."""
        valid_cheque_image.content_type = "image/png"
        valid_cheque_image.filename = "cheque_front.png"

        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.PENDING
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("500.00"),
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        assert result.status == DepositStatus.PENDING

    def test_deposit_rejected_when_no_image_provided(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer
    ):
        """A deposit without any image must raise ValueError."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.side_effect = ValueError(
            "Cheque image is required."
        )

        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Cheque image is required"):
            mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
                customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
                amount=Decimal("500.00"),
                image=None,
            )

    def test_deposit_rejected_for_unsupported_image_format(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """PDF or other non-image formats must be rejected."""
        valid_cheque_image.content_type = "application/pdf"

        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.side_effect = ValueError(
            "Unsupported image format."
        )

        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Unsupported image format"):
            mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
                customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
                amount=Decimal("500.00"),
                image=valid_cheque_image,
            )

    def test_deposit_rejected_when_image_is_blurry(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, blurry_cheque_image
    ):
        """A blurry image that hides cheque fields must be rejected with a
        meaningful error so the customer can retake the photo."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.side_effect = ValueError(
            "Image quality is too low. Please retake the photo."
        )

        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Image quality is too low"):
            mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
                customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
                amount=Decimal("500.00"),
                image=blurry_cheque_image,
            )

    def test_deposit_rejected_when_image_exceeds_size_limit(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, oversized_cheque_image
    ):
        """Images larger than the allowed limit must be rejected."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.side_effect = ValueError(
            "Image file size exceeds the maximum allowed limit."
        )

        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="file size exceeds"):
            mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
                customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
                amount=Decimal("500.00"),
                image=oversized_cheque_image,
            )

    def test_deposit_rejected_for_unauthenticated_customer(
        self, mock_deposit_service, unauthenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """An unauthenticated customer must not be able to submit a deposit."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.side_effect = PermissionError(
            "Customer must be authenticated."
        )

        with pytest.raises(PermissionError, match="must be authenticated"):
            mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
                customer_id=unauthenticated_customer.id,
                amount=Decimal("500.00"),
                image=valid_cheque_image,
            )


# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 2. AMOUNT VALIDATION
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class TestChequeAmountValidation:

    def test_deposit_rejected_for_zero_amount(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.side_effect = ValueError(
            "Deposit amount must be greater than zero."
        )

        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="greater than zero"):
            mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
                customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
                amount=Decimal("0.00"),
                image=valid_cheque_image,
            )

    def test_deposit_rejected_for_negative_amount(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.side_effect = ValueError(
            "Deposit amount must be greater than zero."
        )

        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="greater than zero"):
            mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
                customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
                amount=Decimal("-100.00"),
                image=valid_cheque_image,
            )

    def test_deposit_rejected_for_non_numeric_amount(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.side_effect = TypeError(
            "Amount must be a numeric value."
        )

        with pytest.raises(TypeError, match="numeric value"):
            mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
                customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
                amount="five hundred",
                image=valid_cheque_image,
            )


# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 3. MANUAL VERIFICATION THRESHOLD  (core business rule)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class TestManualVerificationThreshold:
    """
    Requirement: cheques above $5,000 shall require manual verification.
    """

    # ── 3a. Below threshold ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("amount", [
        Decimal("0.01"),
        Decimal("1.00"),
        Decimal("999.99"),
        Decimal("2500.00"),
        Decimal("4999.99"),
        Decimal("5000.00"),          # boundary – AT threshold, not above
    ])
    def test_deposit_does_not_require_manual_review_at_or_below_threshold(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image, amount
    ):
        """Amounts at or below $5,000 must be auto-processed (no manual review)."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.PENDING,
            verification_status=VerificationStatus.AUTO_APPROVED,
            requires_manual_review=False,
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=amount,
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        assert result.requires_manual_review is False
        assert result.verification_status == VerificationStatus.AUTO_APPROVED

    # ── 3b. Above threshold ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("amount", [
        Decimal("5000.01"),          # boundary + 1 cent
        Decimal("5001.00"),
        Decimal("7500.00"),
        Decimal("10000.00"),
        Decimal("99999.99"),
    ])
    def test_deposit_requires_manual_review_above_threshold(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image, amount
    ):
        """Amounts strictly above $5,000 must be flagged for manual verification."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.MANUAL_REVIEW,
            verification_status=VerificationStatus.MANUAL_REQUIRED,
            requires_manual_review=True,
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=amount,
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        assert result.requires_manual_review is True
        assert result.verification_status == VerificationStatus.MANUAL_REQUIRED
        assert result.status == DepositStatus.MANUAL_REVIEW

    # ── 3c. Exact boundary ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def test_deposit_at_exactly_5000_does_not_require_manual_review(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """$5,000.00 is NOT above the threshold; manual review must NOT be triggered."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.PENDING,
            verification_status=VerificationStatus.AUTO_APPROVED,
            requires_manual_review=False,
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("5000.00"),
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        assert result.requires_manual_review is False

    def test_deposit_at_5000_01_requires_manual_review(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """$5,000.01 is above the threshold; manual review MUST be triggered."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.MANUAL_REVIEW,
            verification_status=VerificationStatus.MANUAL_REQUIRED,
            requires_manual_review=True,
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("5000.01"),
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        assert result.requires_manual_review is True

    # ── 3d. Funds hold during manual review ──────────────────────────────────

    def test_funds_are_held_pending_during_manual_review(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """While awaiting manual verification, funds must NOT be credited yet."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.MANUAL_REVIEW,
            funds_available=False,
            requires_manual_review=True,
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("6000.00"),
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        assert result.funds_available is False

    def test_funds_are_available_after_manual_review_approval(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer
    ):
        """After a reviewer approves the deposit, funds must become available."""
        mock_deposit_service.approve_manual_review.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.APPROVED,
            funds_available=True,
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.approve_manual_review(
            deposit_id="DEP-HIGH-001",
            reviewer_id="REV-007",
        )

        assert result.status == DepositStatus.APPROVED
        assert result.funds_available is True

    def test_deposit_rejected_after_manual_review_failure(
        self, mock_deposit_service
    ):
        """If a reviewer rejects a high-value cheque, the deposit must be rejected."""
        mock_deposit_service.reject_manual_review.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.REJECTED,
            funds_available=False,
            rejection_reason="Signature mismatch",
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.reject_manual_review(
            deposit_id="DEP-HIGH-002",
            reviewer_id="REV-007",
            reason="Signature mismatch",
        )

        assert result.status == DepositStatus.REJECTED
        assert result.funds_available is False
        assert result.rejection_reason == "Signature mismatch"

    # ── 3e. Notification ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def test_customer_notified_when_manual_review_required(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """Customer must receive a notification when their deposit enters manual review."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.MANUAL_REVIEW,
            requires_manual_review=True,
            customer_notified=True,
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("10000.00"),
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        assert result.customer_notified is True

    def test_customer_notified_upon_manual_review_outcome(
        self, mock_deposit_service
    ):
        """Customer must be notified when manual review is completed (approved/rejected)."""
        mock_deposit_service.approve_manual_review.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.APPROVED,
            customer_notified=True,
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.approve_manual_review(
            deposit_id="DEP-HIGH-003",
            reviewer_id="REV-007",
        )

        assert result.customer_notified is True


# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 4. DEPOSIT RECORD & AUDIT TRAIL
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class TestDepositRecordAndAuditTrail:

    def test_deposit_record_created_on_submission(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """Every submitted deposit must create a traceable record."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            deposit_id="DEP-001",
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("500.00"),
            status=DepositStatus.PENDING,
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("500.00"),
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        assert result.deposit_id is not None
        assert result.customer_id == authenticated_customer.id
        assert result.amount == Decimal("500.00")

    def test_high_value_deposit_audit_log_contains_reviewer_id(
        self, mock_deposit_service
    ):
        """Manual review actions must be audit-logged with the reviewer's identity."""
        mock_deposit_service.get_audit_log.return_value = MagicMock(
            deposit_id="DEP-HIGH-001",
            reviewer_id="REV-007",
            action="APPROVED",
        )

        audit = mock_deposit_service.get_audit_log(deposit_id="DEP-HIGH-001")

        assert audit.reviewer_id == "REV-007"
        assert audit.action == "APPROVED"

    def test_image_stored_securely_upon_submission(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """The cheque image must be stored and a reference returned for traceability."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            deposit_id="DEP-001",
            image_reference="s3://bucket/cheques/DEP-001.jpg",
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("500.00"),
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        assert result.image_reference is not None
        assert result.image_reference.startswith("s3://")


# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 5. EDGE CASES
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class TestEdgeCases:

    def test_duplicate_cheque_submission_is_rejected(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """Submitting the same cheque image twice must be detected and rejected."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.side_effect = [
            MagicMock(status=DepositStatus.PENDING, deposit_id="DEP-001"),
            ValueError("Duplicate cheque detected."),
        ]

        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("500.00"),
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Duplicate cheque"):
            mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
                customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
                amount=Decimal("500.00"),
                image=valid_cheque_image,
            )

    def test_deposit_threshold_is_exactly_5000_dollars(self):
        """Verify the business constant is set correctly."""
        assert MANUAL_REVIEW_THRESHOLD == Decimal("5000.00")

    def test_deposit_amount_with_high_precision_above_threshold(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """Floating-point precision must not cause incorrect threshold evaluation."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            requires_manual_review=True,
            verification_status=VerificationStatus.MANUAL_REQUIRED,
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("5000.001"),   # fractional cent above threshold
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        assert result.requires_manual_review is True

    def test_service_unavailability_returns_graceful_error(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """If the deposit service is down, a ServiceUnavailableError must be raised."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.side_effect = ConnectionError(
            "Deposit service is temporarily unavailable."
        )

        with pytest.raises(ConnectionError, match="temporarily unavailable"):
            mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
                customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
                amount=Decimal("500.00"),
                image=valid_cheque_image,
            )
```

---

## Coverage Summary

| # | Test Class | What Is Verified |
|---|-----------|-----------------|
| 1 | `TestMobileImageSubmission` | Valid JPEG/PNG accepted · No image rejected · Bad format rejected · Blurry/oversized image rejected · Unauthenticated customer rejected |
| 2 | `TestChequeAmountValidation` | Zero, negative, and non-numeric amounts rejected |
| 3 | `TestManualVerificationThreshold` | ≤ $5,000 → auto-approved · > $5,000 → manual review · Boundary values (exact $5,000 and $5,000.01) · Funds held during review · Approved/rejected after review · Customer notifications |
| 4 | `TestDepositRecordAndAuditTrail` | Deposit record created · Reviewer ID logged · Image stored securely |
| 5 | `TestEdgeCases` | Duplicate cheque rejected · Threshold constant correct · High-precision amounts handled · Service unavailability handled gracefully |

> **Note:** Replace the `MagicMock`-based service with your real `ChequeDepositService` import to run these as integration tests. The test logic remains unchanged.

# Pytest Tests for Mobile Cheque Deposit Requirement

```python
"""
Test Suite: Mobile Cheque Deposit via Image
Requirement: A customer shall deposit a cheque via mobile image;
             cheques above $5,000 shall require manual verification.
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, AsyncMock
from decimal import Decimal
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models / enums assumed from production code
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# from cheque_deposit.service import ChequDepositService
# from cheque_deposit.models import (
#     ChequeDeposit, DepositStatus, VerificationStatus, ChequeImage
# )
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


class DepositStatus(Enum):
    PENDING = "PENDING"
    APPROVED = "APPROVED"
    REJECTED = "REJECTED"
    MANUAL_REVIEW = "MANUAL_REVIEW"


class VerificationStatus(Enum):
    AUTO_APPROVED = "AUTO_APPROVED"
    MANUAL_REQUIRED = "MANUAL_REQUIRED"


# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Fixtures
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

MANUAL_REVIEW_THRESHOLD = Decimal("5000.00")


@pytest.fixture
def valid_cheque_image():
    """Returns a mock of a valid, readable mobile cheque image."""
    image = MagicMock()
    image.filename = "cheque_front.jpg"
    image.content_type = "image/jpeg"
    image.size_bytes = 2_000_000          # 2 MB
    image.is_readable = True
    image.is_blurry = False
    image.all_fields_visible = True
    return image


@pytest.fixture
def blurry_cheque_image(valid_cheque_image):
    valid_cheque_image.is_blurry = True
    valid_cheque_image.all_fields_visible = False
    return valid_cheque_image


@pytest.fixture
def oversized_cheque_image(valid_cheque_image):
    valid_cheque_image.size_bytes = 20_000_000   # 20 MB – exceeds limit
    return valid_cheque_image


@pytest.fixture
def mock_deposit_service():
    service = MagicMock()
    service.MANUAL_REVIEW_THRESHOLD = MANUAL_REVIEW_THRESHOLD
    return service


@pytest.fixture
def authenticated_customer():
    customer = MagicMock()
    customer.id = "CUST-001"
    customer.is_authenticated = True
    customer.account_number = "ACC-123456"
    customer.is_active = True
    return customer


@pytest.fixture
def unauthenticated_customer():
    customer = MagicMock()
    customer.id = None
    customer.is_authenticated = False
    return customer


# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Helper
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def make_deposit_result(amount, image, service):
    """
    Thin wrapper that mirrors the real service interface so that the
    same assertion helpers work for both unit and integration tests.
    """
    return service.deposit_cheque(
        customer_id=authenticated_customer,
        amount=Decimal(str(amount)),
        image=image,
    )


# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 1. IMAGE SUBMISSION
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class TestMobileImageSubmission:

    def test_deposit_accepted_with_valid_jpeg_image(
        self, mock_deposit_service, authenticated_customer, valid_cheque_image
    ):
        """Happy-path: a valid JPEG image triggers a successful deposit request."""
        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.return_value = MagicMock(
            status=DepositStatus.PENDING, deposit_id="DEP-001"
        )

        result = mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque(
            customer_id=authenticated_customer.id,
            amount=Decimal("500.00"),
            image=valid_cheque_image,
        )

        mock_deposit_service.deposit_cheque.assert_called_once()
        assert result.status == DepositStatus.PENDING
        assert
